use_cases: Creating animated hero sections with flowing mesh gradients as landing page backgrounds
Adding WebGL-powered visual effects to SaaS product pages and marketing sites
Building immersive hero sections with interactive shader backgrounds for web applications
Enhancing landing pages with animated gradient effects using SVG glass and gooey filters
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered hero shader background component using @paper-design/shaders-react with MeshGradient rendering and SVG filters for glass-morphism and gooey visual effects. The component responds to mouse hover state changes while continuously animating the shader background. It wraps content in a 650px minimum height container with overflow handling, designed for use as hero sections on landing pages and marketing sites.
